summary: 6 tests in tests/test_todo_sync.py::TestRenderTodoChecklist fail with AttributeError: 'Orchestrator' object has no attribute '_render_todo_checklist'. The method was moved to ExecutionWorkflow.render_plan_comment() but the tests still call the old Orchestrator method. Fix: update TestRenderTodoChecklist to instantiate ExecutionWorkflow and call render_plan_comment() instead of orch._render_todo_checklist().
